section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a specific lab result and should be documented as an objective finding rather than within the assessment.

section_miscategorizations.text: The doctor will increase the norvasc dose.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This conflicts with the earlier explicit prescription of a fixed dose of norvasc in the same Plan section, creating internal inconsistency in the management plan organization, though it is still correctly placed in the Plan overall.
